segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: When was the last time this country hosted the Olympic Games?

translations.zh-Hans: 这个国家上一次主办奥运会是什么时候？

segments.text: The Olympic Games will be held in our country in four years' time.

translations.zh-Hans: 四年以后，奥运会将在我国举行。

segments.text: As a great many people will be visiting the country, the government will be building new hotels, an immense stadium, and a new Olympic Standard swimming pool.

translations.zh-Hans: 由于许多人将来我国访问，政府将建造新的旅馆、一座巨大的体育场和一座新的奥运会标准游泳池。

segments.text: They will also be building new roads and a special railway line.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们还将修建新的道路和一条专用铁路。

segments.text: The games will be held just outside the capital and the whole area will be called Olympic City.

translations.zh-Hans: 运动会将在首都城外举行，整个地区将被称为奥林匹克城。

segments.text: Workers will have completed the new roads by the end of next year. By the end of next year, they will have finished work on the new stadium.

translations.zh-Hans: 工人们将在明年年底前修完新道路；到明年年底，他们还将建成新体育场。

segments.text: The fantastic modern buildings have been designed by Kurt Gunter.

translations.zh-Hans: 这些奇妙的现代化建筑由库尔特·冈特设计。

segments.text: Everybody will be watching anxiously as the new buildings go up.

translations.zh-Hans: 大家都将焦急地注视着这些新建筑拔地而起。

segments.text: We are all very excited and are looking forward to the Olympic Games because they have never been held before in this country.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们都非常激动，盼望着奥运会的到来，因为我国以前从未举办过奥运会。
